tasks.title: Create the design-token foundation
tasks.description: Define the paper, ink, typography, spacing, border, and motion primitives used throughout the site.
acceptanceCriteria: Global paper, ink, muted ink, border, and accent variables exist
The root layout loads display and body typography through next/font
No gallery, filtering, modal, or animation feature is added
The page works at 320px without horizontal overflow
Lint, type checking, and production build pass

tasks.title: Create the canonical panel data model
tasks.description: Add typed metadata for six representative placeholder panels.
acceptanceCriteria: One canonical MangaPanel interface exists
Six panels cover portrait, landscape, square, and spread formats
No component contains duplicated panel metadata
The model can support at least 100 records without structural changes
Lint, type checking, and production build pass

tasks.title: Build the editorial gallery composition
tasks.description: Render the six panels as a responsive editorial exhibition.
acceptanceCriteria: Panels are rendered from the canonical data source
The layout is not a uniform card grid
DOM order remains logical and accessible
Portrait and spread artwork do not appear awkwardly cropped
Artwork remains the dominant element
The layout passes at 320px, 768px, and 1440px
Lint, type checking, and production build pass

tasks.title: Implement the panel detail experience
tasks.description: Create an accessible detail experience with URL-backed selection.
acceptanceCriteria: A panel can be opened and closed using the keyboard
Escape closes the view
Left and right arrows navigate between panels
Focus returns to the triggering element
The selected panel is represented in the URL
Mobile uses an immersive reading layout
Lint, type checking, and production build pass
